name: office-agents-ai
description: This is an office agents AI orchestrator repository to spawn multiple agents that work together

scripts.start: if lsof -iTCP:8000 -sTCP:LISTEN -n -P >/dev/null; then echo 'Using existing Chroma server on localhost:8000'; else npx chroma run --path ./chroma-db & fi; until curl -sf http://localhost:8000/api/v2/heartbeat > /dev/null; do sleep 1; done; tsx office.ts

author: Sebastian Bonilla
